description: This project explores whether or not median household income has an association with educational attainment and the number of schools in an area.

dcat:Dataset.title: American Community Survey 2024
dcat:Dataset.description: Provides information about social, economic, housing, demographic, etc. about the United States Population.

dcat:Dataset.title: Public School File: 2024-25
dcat:Dataset.description: List of every public school in the United States recognized by the U.S. Education Department

dcat:Dataset.description: List of every postsecondary school in the United States recognized by the U.S. Education Department

title: To what extent does education impact median household income?
